Michael SCREAMS again whipping around to be face to face
with GUS, a short, stout ghost with a full white beard -­
Michael stops stunned. Then continues to SCREAM --Gus,
equally as frightened, starts to SCREAM with him!
Michael rockets back behind his sister.
